asset.display_name: 国证自由现金流全收益指数

limitations: This report establishes price drawdown facts only.
Historical drawdown percentiles are not calculated.
Recovery probabilities and forward returns are not calculated.
Strategy parameters and portfolio weights are not designed.
Blocked assets are not analyzed or substituted.
Completed-event outcomes are hindsight records; historical decisions must use the as-of interface.

methodology.event_start: first observation strictly below the current high watermark
methodology.high_watermark: expanding maximum using observations through each date
methodology.peak_tie: most recent equal high while no event is open
methodology.recovery: first observation at or above the event peak value
methodology.trough_tie: first observation at the minimum value
